story_intro: Meghan and Owen met soon after college, by a small accident of circumstance: their roommates were dating each other. Meghan and Edie didn't know each other very well, and almost didn’t live together at all. Everything that followed turns on that one near-miss.
story_p2: Owen was taken with her from the start, and after a few months of friendship he said as much. One week into dating, Meghan told her friend Sophia, *“I’m going to marry him.”* Five years later, here we are!
story_p3: Anyone who knows them will tell you they balance each other perfectly. Meghan is hilarious, organized, and unapologetically type A, while Owen is calm, go with the flow, endlessly romantic, and every bit as funny. Together, they make life feel both exciting and easy. They're always laughing, always supporting each other, and always bringing out the best in one another.
story_close: Owen pulled off the ultimate surprise proposal. While Meghan was on a Greek island with Sophia, Sophia's family, and Edie, Owen flew thirty-six hours across the world to propose. Her friends were in on it & so were Sophia’s parents, who spent an entire day showing Owen around the island. He appeared at sunset on their second-to-last night, the blue-domed Church of the Seven Martyrs floating in the Aegean behind them.
welcome_lede: We’re getting married, and we’d love for you to be there — an evening at The Ryland Inn, in the New Jersey countryside.
pullquote: He came halfway around the world to ask. I’d known the answer for years.
pullquote_attr: At sunset · on a cliff above the Aegean
welcome_body: We’re marrying on the evening of Friday, June 18, 2027, at The Ryland Inn in Whitehouse Station — about an hour west of the city. Everything you’ll need is right here: the schedule, where to stay, and how to get there.
